message:
refactor: migrate GrepTool fs::metadata to asupersync async filesystem

Replace std::fs::metadata with asupersync::fs::metadata in GrepTool's
search path validation, converting the call to async (.await) to align
with the ongoing Asupersync filesystem migration. This ensures the grep
tool's directory detection uses the same async-capable filesystem layer
as the rest of the tool implementations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
